name: saw
effect: Use to split a die (once per turn).

name: glue
effect: Use to merge 2 dice (once).

name: measuring tape
effect: Use to gain 1 ghostdie for each empty table area (once).

name: catapult
effect: Use to move 1 item from the table to the the pile (once).

name: tax papers
effect: When die roll value becomes 6| set it to 3.

name: club
effect: *Once* effects can be activated 2 times.

name: bingo card
effect: Use to move 3 items with the same cost to bag.

name: showel
effect: Use to move 1 trinket from Void to table (once).

name: boardgame box
effect: Use to store a die for the next turn.

name: slots
effect: Use to roll 1 die. If roll is less than 3| move that many items to table.

name: grapling hook
effect: When this is moved to table| one extra item is moved from pile.

name: waifu pillow
effect: Use to rool a die (once). All die rolls are reduced by 2.

name: book
effect: Use to move 1 item to table| then gain 3 ghostdice.

name: tower
effect: Use to reroll 1 die (once).

name: crime evidence
effect: Use to swap this with an item from Void or bag.

name: scales
effect: Use to gain 1 ghostdie for each tool on the table (once).

name: wallet
effect: When this is moved to table| get 1 die.

name: calculator
effect: Use to multiply the roll value of 1 die by 2.

name: bone
effect: If this is in Void| use it to place it on table.

name: bar scanner
effect: When a relic is moved to table| gain 1 ghosdie.

name: mirror
effect: If you moved no items to Void| use this to gain 1 die (once).

name: fly tape
effect: Use to place this on top of another item. Both items move together.

name: snake
effect: When you roll a 2| place 2 items on table.

name: cat
effect: When a relic is moved to table| move it to Void.

name: horse head
effect: When you roll a 6| random tool is moved to Void.

name: mouse
effect: Roll 1 less die at the start of the turn. Once per turn| gain 3.

name: jewel
effect: Move this to Void| to roll an extra die.

name: garbage
effect: When this is moved| gain 1 antidie.

name: ale
effect: Use to reroll all dice| then send this to bag.

name: counterspell
effect: When this is moved on table| return all items to pile.

name: head
effect: Use to place 1 cursed item from void or bag on table (once).

name: bath water
effect: When an item is moved to Void| gain 1 ghostdie.

name: pickle
effect: When this is moved to Void| move 1 item to bag.

name: globules
effect: Use to move 1 item from table to void| then roll 1 die.

name: birthday candle
effect: When this is moved| gain 1 ghostdie.
